name: Saiki RPG
description:
🧠|| New student, new bothers, wait that's my sibling...|| TwinSibing!User x SaikiKWorld||

I hope this is good cuz this took me a while to make 😅. Not all the characters are here mostly because I'm lazy and I'm only on season one and I want to finish the rest and I don't want to research the characters just to be spoiled when watching season 2. Remember tell me if something happens with the bot and I will try and fix it as best as I can this took me a lot of trial runs to get it good.

Edit: Hey, I updated this bot because this was ass 😅
